label: Effective string-theory edge/worldsheet view
description: Render cyclic repair paths, collar-like screen defect worldlines, and H3 proto-particle tracks as the current effective string/worldsheet diagnostic layer. The export is enough for a schematic edge-string view, but not enough to claim a critical string CFT; that requires EDGE_CYLINDER current, Virasoro, Sugawara, supercurrent, and spin-structure receipts.

viewContract.label: Effective string-theory edge/worldsheet view
viewContract.description: Render cyclic repair paths, collar-like screen defect worldlines, and H3 proto-particle tracks as the current effective string/worldsheet diagnostic layer. The export is enough for a schematic edge-string view, but not enough to claim a critical string CFT; that requires EDGE_CYLINDER current, Virasoro, Sugawara, supercurrent, and spin-structure receipts.

visualEncodings.encoding: closed loops or edge strings on the finite carrier
edge/ribbon pulse height or glow at loopPhase for each exact repair frame
H3 trajectory overlay with dashed non-particle styling until receipts pass
10-20 seeded organic defect tracks as points, ribbons, or edge-string polylines
animate randomized two-defect support overlap as scatter/bind/annihilate/pass-through
candidate sieve bars, gate matrix, and open-certificate badges

animationChannels.encoding: edge activation traveling along finite cycles
exact finite repair edge-pulse samples; animate loopPhase and normalizedAmplitude
ribbon surface swept by repair-frame sequence
track interpolation through H3 event samples
animate seeded organic defect points/ribbons through H3
animate randomized pair motion, transverse perturbation, support overlap, and explicit contact outcome
step through OPH target gates, encoded candidate scores, and open certificate gates

twoDefectStressContractionAssay.claimBoundary: Controlled/planted stress-contraction diagnostic only; not spontaneous particle formation, production gravity, or a physical prediction.

organicDefectPopulation.claimBoundary: Organic multi-defect diagnostic only; not particle matter or production gravity.

freeTwoDefectDynamics.claimBoundary: Free randomized two-defect dynamics diagnostic only; not production gravity, spontaneous particle matter, or a physical merger claim.

stringVacuumSelector.visualMetaphor: OPH normal-form sieve over candidate critical-string presentations

selectorStack.label: OPH fixed-cutoff patch algebra
selectorStack.description: Finite observer patches, overlap repair, records, clocks, and boundary readout.

selectorStack.label: Edge-string effective language
selectorStack.description: Cyclic edge normal forms, repair histories, and collar/worldsheet diagnostics.

selectorStack.label: BD heterotic critical-string witness
selectorStack.description: Requires critical-edge, cohomology, safety-realization, threshold, and moduli certificates.

acceptanceGates.label: Higgs sector
acceptanceGates.requirement: Exactly one Higgs pair on the low-energy branch

acceptanceGates.label: Gauge proton decay
acceptanceGates.requirement: Product-group adjoint contains no mixed (3,2,+/-5/6) gauge bosons

acceptanceGates.label: Operator safety
acceptanceGates.requirement: Z_4^R permits Yukawas/Weinberg and forbids perturbative RPV, d=5 proton decay, and mu term

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Carrier and refinement manifest
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: model hashes, local factors, update/repair gates, transfer callbacks, A5 action, orientation involution, translation, record/port operators

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Twelve-port dynamical rank
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: rank R_port=12 with A5 sectors 1+3+3'+5 nonzero under refinement

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Orientation independence
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: both A5 x C2 orientation parities survive dynamically

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Conserved currents
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: edge-cylinder continuity equation and chiral level ranks k_L=24, k_R=12

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Virasoro central charge
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: lattice stress-tensor modes with c_L -> 24 and c_R -> 12

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Sugawara exhaustion
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: T_OPH - T_Sug -> 0; no residual positive-central-charge coset

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Supercurrent
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: right-moving graded sector and local odd supercurrent with Q_N^2 -> H_R

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Torus, spin structures, internal lattice
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: modular spin-structure partition functions and rank-sixteen even self-dual left-moving internal lattice

criticalEdgeCertificateGates.label: Blind refinement and falsification
criticalEdgeCertificateGates.neededInput: pre-registered refinements plus controls that break orientation, ports, geometry, spectators, chirality, and seams

encodedCandidateSieve.verdict: Selected operator-safe candidate in the encoded structural audit.

falsifierMatrix.consequence: Retracts the OPH visible landing branch.
Severe pressure on the OPH normal-form sieve.
Retracts BD_{n=1}^{OPH} as named geometric witness.

falsifierMatrix.failureMode: Z_4^R or equivalent safety layer absent

falsifierMatrix.consequence: Severe pressure on the effective theory.
Retracts the heterotic critical-worldsheet identification of the sewn edge branch.
Weakens the string continuation; the OPH recovered core is a separate claim tier.

stringVacuumSelector.claimBoundary: String-vacuum selector visualization data from the OPH paper gate stack. The encoded structural sieve selects the operator-safe BD witness inside its declared audit rows, but the simulator does not emit critical-edge, BD cohomology, threshold, moduli-locking, or global uniqueness certificates.

viewContract.claimBoundary: This is an effective edge-string diagnostic view. It must not be labeled a proven critical heterotic worldsheet until the finite-carrier critical-edge receipt suite passes.

finiteEdgeStringVibrationClaimBoundary: Exact finite repair/cycle edge-pulse samples over the OPH carrier. These are the most direct available string-vibration inputs for the visualizer, but they are not critical-string normal modes or physical string oscillations without the critical-edge receipt suite.
